transition: 兌 Duì (Joyous Lake) -> 無妄 Wú Wàng (Innocence)
verse_zh: 結網得解，受福安坐，終无患禍。
verse_en: The knotted net finds release; one receives blessing and sits at ease. In the end there is no trouble or calamity.
note: Blessing and ease -> fisherman at rest scene, stipple render. Matrix-skin finish on proven composition.
prompt: Beneath a thatched eave framing the view, an old fisherman sits at ease on worn planks, a loosened net slack at his feet like unraveled ink threads. In the midground a calm inlet catches dawn light; a small boat drifts, its lantern a single amber spark. Reed banks and pale hills recede into mist beyond. Golden age science fiction stipple illustration, thousands of individual ink dots building luminous tonal gradients, figures emerging from darkness through pure pointillism technique, ethereal glowing quality, meticulous dot-work rendering every form, phosphor-green and amber palette on black.
